titleStmt.title: SII 9.527: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 527. (A.R. No. 626 of 1904.) AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE SECOND GOPURA OF THE VEDAVALLI-TAYAR SHRINE IN THE VEDANARAYANASVAMI TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is a copy of A.R. No. 619 of 1904 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada māgha śu 3 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaThesvasti zrī are written at the beginning of the second line.
śrīvīrakṛṣṇarāyamahārāyaru virupaya ru nāgālādēviya Aramana
ya pura dēvastānakkeŪ Aṣṭamāṁ(va)śadanitakkeŪ taṁma rāyasa prakāradale hākida sāsaneyallekaṭu da kallu
gaḷanu kittuhākida durjanaru yibaru mūvarigetakka kaṭṭupāṭu māḍi Avara mēlaṇa lekhada hoṁnanū
tegadu guḍige koḍisuvudu Aṣṭamāṁ(va)śake modalu viṁgaḍisi koṭa gadde mānyanelanu Allade mikkaṁ
thā nelanu guḍiya viniyōgadavara jītakke viṁgaḍisūdu viṣṇustānadalli durjanaru māḍida Akrutyagaḷanu biḍi
si girimēlaṇa vēdagiriperumāḷige tiruṇāḷanu sāgisi pūjeyanu māḍisūdu guḍage Uṁṭāda kaṭṭa
ḷegeU tiruvaḷiyāṭa grāmagaḷigeU cātina cātāda vayiṣṇavarigeU kriṣṇarāya mo
dali dinadalli Avanige naḍada stāna nirvāha UbhayagrāmagaḷigeU hiṁdake naṁma rāyasa tāṁbra
sāsana pālisi naḍada mariyādele yogalu naḍeva hāge kaṭṭaḷemāḍi cittayisteU Ā mariyāde
li naḍasibahudu Ā mariyādele yellavanū naḍisi bahāge kaṭṭaḷaya māḍuvudu Aṣṭamāṁ(va)śadava
rige hiṁdakke viṁgaḍisikoṭṭa staḷadale ḍūdū dēvara pūje punaskāra Aṁga
raṁgavayibhōgagaḷanu sāṁgavāgi naḍasūdu nāvu hiṁdakke dēvastānakaṁ Ubhaya kaṭṭaḷe modalā
gi tiruveḷeyāṭakū kaṭṭaḷeya māḍe cittayistagrāmagaḷu voṁdaralu kaḍameyillada hāge naḍasūdu
Āgi Ā stitiyanu nirupa cittayisteU śrīvirupākṣa .
Digital edition of SII 9.527 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
